ground_truth.title: Best Residential Movers in NYC 2025 | Top 19 Companies | Supermove
ground_truth.author: Supermove
ground_truth.main_content:
Looking for a moving company in the NYC? You're probably looking for a company that has good track record, and fits your timeline and budget. According to our data and research, we've compiled a list of the top residential moving companies in the five boroughs to consider before booking your next move. The first companies on this list stand out for embracing modern, tech-enabled moving practices. While we've featured them at the top for their innovative approach, the full list remains ranked objectively based on customer reviews and overall reputation.

1. JP Urban Moving - Total Reviews: 726, Average Rating: 4.9. JP Urban Moving is a top-rated, family-owned moving company, with over 15 years experience providing A+ quality moving services. Prompt, thorough and courteous communication keeps their customers informed every step of the way, reducing the stress that often accompanies a move. They are responsive to estimate requests and bookings, address any building issues timely, and send you text message updates before, during and after the move.

2. Metropolis Moving - Total Reviews: 628, Average Rating: 4.9. Metropolis Moving is a locally owned and operated residential moving company based in NYC. They are one of the newer moving companies in the area, but their experience is anything but lacking. Their foremen are managers in the company and are paid a percentage of each move rather than per hour to ensure accountability.

3. Blue Moving - Total Reviews: 313, Average Rating: 4.8. Blue Moving is a reliable moving company that's become popular in NYC for being careful, friendly, and easy to work with. Their team shows up on time, works quickly, and handles your things with care.

4. Liberty Moving - Total Reviews: 255, Average Rating: 4.25. Liberty Moving & Storage was founded nearly 8 decades ago. They've stood the test of time by providing a high level of customer service and holding their employees to high standards.

5. Moving of America - Total Reviews: 106, Average Rating: 3.8. Moving of America is more than just your friendly local and long-distance moving company; they are a family-oriented business serving the tri-state area since 2006.

6. NYC Great Movers - Total Reviews: 2,700, Average Rating: 4.8. NYC Great Movers is a local, licensed, insured, and reliable moving company based in Brooklyn. Affordable rates and professional service help them stand out.

7. Perfect Moving - Total Reviews: 2,155, Average Rating: 4.85. Perfect Moving's mission is to move you, not just your boxes. They offer a full range of services and provide you with a 100% stress-free experience.

8. Dumbo Moving & Storage - Total Reviews: 6,145, Average Rating: 3.75. Dumbo Moving & Storage is a licensed and insured company that can move you locally or long-distance. They started in 2007 with just one moving truck and now have 155 trucks.

9. Maxi Moving - Total Reviews: 718, Average Rating: 4.85. Maxi Moving is where affordable rates meet quality and professionalism. They are a licensed and insured full service moving company.

10. Man with A Van - Total Reviews: 1,052, Average Rating: 4.45. Starting in 2000 with a single van in NYC, Paul Kennedy built Man With A Van into a multi-location business that now operates 25 vehicles.

11. Oz Moving & Storage - Total Reviews: 1,865, Average Rating: 4. Oz Moving & Storage started in 1993 with a radical promise to treat customers fairly. Each year Oz moves 15,000 New Yorkers.

12. Lifestyle Moving - Total Reviews: 383, Average Rating: 4.85. Lifestyle Moving & Storage provides cost-effective local moving and storage services in NYC. Their professional team goes above and beyond to make sure your items stay dry, secure, and well-protected.

13. Men on the Move - Total Reviews: 689, Average Rating: 4.3. Men on the Move has moved families all around the east coast since 1985. They are a proud supporter of Autism Speaks.

14. NYC Moves - Total Reviews: 228, Average Rating: 4.8. NYC Moves is a full service moving company with 25 years experience. They move anything from one piece to a full house and provide flat rates.

15. Shleppers Moving & Storage - Total Reviews: 1,201, Average Rating: 3.5. With locations serving the five boroughs and beyond, Shleppers can take care of your local, regional or cross-country move. They also offer junk removal services.

16. Konstantly Moving - Total Reviews: 146, Average Rating: 4.95. Konstantly Moving started in 2015 but they have over 17 years of experience in the moving industry. They believe New Yorkers deserve outstanding service with efficient and fast work.

17. Lift NYC Moving & Storage - Total Reviews: 144, Average Rating: 4.6. Lift NYC is a full service moving company offering professional assistance at competitive prices. They charge by the hour, which means you don't have to tell them every little item to get a quote.

18. Hudson Moving & Storage - Total Reviews: 31, Average Rating: 4.45. Hudson Moving & Storage Co. was established in 1992 and has built success with their many loyal customers in the New York City Metropolitan area and around the world.

19. Rob the Mover - Total Reviews: 9, Average Rating: 4.1. Experience and proficiency are both important virtues to the team at Rob the Mover, along with total dedication to customer satisfaction.

Conclusion: Whether you've secured the perfect apartment in New York City or just purchased your dream home in Brooklyn, the only task left is transitioning into your new living space. Note: Review Data is based on an update from May 2, 2025.
with: According to our data and research, we've compiled a list of the top residential moving companies in the five boroughs to consider before booking your next move.
JP Urban Moving is a top-rated, family-owned moving company, with over 15 years experience providing A+ quality moving services.
Metropolis Moving is a locally owned and operated residential moving company based in NYC.
Blue Moving is a reliable moving company that's become popular in NYC for being careful, friendly, and easy to work with.
Dumbo Moving & Storage started in 2007 with just one moving truck. Now their company has 155 trucks and over 10,000 positive reviews online.
